title: Towers Saga
description:
When humans walked the earth, the towers stood ruined. After Babylon scrambled their languages and civilisations, many years passed until humanity united as one. Slowly, one by one, the towers were rebuilt, and the greatest tale of them all, the Towers Saga, was formed!

Towers Saga is a 3D Match-3 puzzle game in which you control falling blocks and try to connect blocks of the same type to create combos, earning the highest score and completing the level objectives. Travel in time and solve the tower puzzles in many ancient and historic locations, including Babylon itself, the Colosseum in Rome, mystical Stonehenge, and many more!

🎮 Game Modes 🎮• Story - pass levels from the story earning stars and high-scores, telling the epic tale of the towers.

• Endless - play any unlocked level, trying to beat the last high score.

• Duel - play against a friend in a local splitscreen match.

• Sprint - earn a high score in a sequence of 5 back-to-back consecutive levels.

• Marathon - earn a high score in a sequence of 10 back-to-back consecutive levels.

🏆 Online Leaderboards 🏆• Challenge your friends and players worldwide.

• Climb the ranks and prove who is the ultimate architect of ancient wonders.

• Track your progress and celebrate your victories on the global stage.

• Watch the replays of the best to learn their secrets!
description_short: Guide humanity by building grand towers in this 3D Match-3 falling blocks puzzle game. Recall the greatest tale of them all and witness the wonders of the ancient world in Babylon, Egypt, Atlantis, and much more!
